antigravity_skill_orchestration.directives: Utilize 'antigravity-design-expert' to create a high-contrast 'Arena' layout. Direct 'seo-programmatic' to generate unique analysis for all three series folders. Use 'performance-optimizer' to ensure the multi-series image grid loads instantly.

generation_prompts.landing_page_ui: Build a 'Fighter's Archive' UI using Tailwind CSS 4.1. 1. HERO: A cinematic, high-intensity action composition of Baki vs Yujiro. Use a 'concrete texture' CSS overlay. Title 'BAKI DOU ONLINE' in massive, distressed red typography. 2. SERIES SELECTOR: Create three high-impact 'Arena Entry' buttons to switch between Grappler Baki, Baki-Dou, and Golden Kamui. 3. CHAPTER GRID: Design cards that look like 'Fight Contracts'. Left side: High-res colored cover. Right side: Chapter number, name, and a 'Status: Confirmed' badge. Use a 'brushed metal' hover effect.
generation_prompts.seo_geo_strategy: Activate 'seo-geo' to target Brazil, Japan, and US (major Baki hubs). Generate meta-tags for 'Read Baki-Dou Online' and 'Grappler Baki All Chapters'. Inject JSON-LD Schema for a multi-series manga repository.
generation_prompts.technical_files: Generate robots.txt, a multi-series sitemap.xml, and .htaccess for high-speed cache headers. Use 'seo-sitemap' to prioritize the latest chapters across all three folders.

technical_architectures.image_workflow: Convert all folder assets to AVIF via 'python-performance-optimization'. Implement an 'Arena Scroll' (Intersection Observer) where cards 'slam' into place as the user scrolls down.
technical_architectures.tag_integration: Inject G-LCEWMY6R68 tracking into the global template. Set up custom event tracking for which series (Baki vs Golden Kamui) is getting more clicks.

interactive_elements: Impact Tremor: The screen shakes slightly when the hero section loads.
Muscle Flex Animation: Chapter cards expand slightly with a 'flex' ease-out on hover.
Blood Splatter Separators: Section dividers with a gritty red liquid texture.
Steel Loading Spinner: A heavy industrial gear spinning during transitions.
